history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell (2,B) facing right. The cell directly ahead (2,C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To navigate towards the goal at (8,H), I need to move downward first. Turning clockwise will change my orientation to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3,B) is safe floor. Moving down will bring me closer to the goal. I will continue downward until I reach row 8.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (4,B) is safe floor. Moving down continues my descent towards the goal at (8,H). I will continue moving down until I reach row 8, then navigate rightwards.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (4,B) facing down. The next cell (5,B) is safe floor. I will continue moving down to make progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (5,B) facing down. The cell ahead (6,B) is safe floor. I continue moving down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,B) facing down. The cell ahead (7,B) is floor. I continue moving down toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,B) facing down. The cell ahead (8,B) is safe floor. Moving down brings me closer to the goal area. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8,B) facing down. The goal is at (8,H). To reach it, I need to go east first to (8,C) and (8,D). Currently facing down, so I need to turn counter-clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8,B) facing right. The cell ahead (8,C) is safe floor. Moving there is a step toward the goal. I'll go forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8,C) facing right. The cell ahead (8,D) is floor, so I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8,D) facing right. The cell ahead (8,E) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go up to navigate around the lava obstacles. To face up, I will turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8, D) facing up. The cell directly ahead (7, D) is a floor tile, so it is safe to move forward. My goal is to reach (8, H), and I plan to go north to row 4, then east to column F, then north to row 2, then east to column H, then south to the goal. The next step in this plan is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, D) facing up. I need to reach the goal at (8, H). My plan is to go north to row 4, then east, then north to row 2, then east to column H, then south to the goal. The next step is to move forward to (6, D).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row6 column D facing up. The goal is at row8 column H. I plan to go north to row4, then east to column F, then north to row2, then east to column H, then south to goal. Next step: move forward to row5 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row5 col D facing up. I plan to go north to D4, then east to E4, then to F4, then north to F2, then east to G2, then east to H2, then south to H8. Next step: move forward to D4.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row4 col D facing up. Goal is at row8 col H. I plan to go north to D2, then east to H2, then south to H8. Next step: move forward to D3.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing up. I need to go south to eventually reach the goal at row 8, column H. The best path is to go down to D4, then east to E4, then east to F4, then north to F2, then east to G2, then east to H2, then south along H to H7, and finally south to H8. Currently, I need to change my orientation from up to down. I will first turn clockwise to face right, then turn clockwise again to face down. So my next action is a clockwise turn.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing right. I need to head down to eventually reach the goal at row 8, column H. The cell directly in front (row 3, column E) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I will turn clockwise to face down. Then I can move to (4, D) which is empty.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing down. The cell ahead (row 4, column D) is empty, so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the eventual eastward crossing at row 4.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (4,D) facing down. To begin moving east to eventually loop around through the top row, I need to turn counter-clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column D facing right. The cell to the east (row 04, column E) is empty, so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the path that goes north and then east to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column E facing right. The cell ahead (row 04 column F) is safe floor. Moving forward will bring me to a better position to begin heading north and then east to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
